span.div:
Tree-sitter parse, typed AST
build, build-time type
inference.

div.style: color: rgb(68, 68, 68) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
AST to C source text, then
c2mir to MIR. ifdef-gated.

div.style: color: rgb(68, 68, 68) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
AST lowered straight to MIR
IR; inline boxing; GC-root
frames.

and MIR_gen, debug table.
